zh.Standish, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什
zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Standish於大約1090年出生在英國。他於1115年之前與Juliana de Lancashire結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Standish, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾斯坦迪什
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Standish于大约1090年出生在英国。他于1115年之前与Juliana de Lancashire结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Standish was born about 1090, in England. He married Juliana de Lancashire before 1115. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Standish est né environ 1090, à Angleterre. Il a épousé Juliana de Lancashire avant 1115. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Standish wurde um 1090 in England geboren. Er hat vor 1115 Juliana de Lancashire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Standish è nato il circa 1090 nel England. Lui sposato Juliana de Lancashire prima del 1115. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Standish, Lancashire, England: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュ
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Standishは約1090年にイギリスで生まれた。1115年以前にJuliana de Lancashireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Standish(은)는 대략 1090년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 1115년 이전 Juliana de Lancashire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

mn.Standish, Lancashire, England: Standish, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Standish nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Juliana de Lancashire antes 1115. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Standish родился около 1090 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana de Lancashire перед 1115 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Standish nació aproximadamente 1090, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Juliana de Lancashire antes de 1115. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
